selected_markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <46° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Niagara underdog with mid_prob at 0.45. Moderate volume supports market efficiency. No bias detected. Confidence limited by typical college hockey volatility.
Robert Morris slight favorite at 0.45 probability. Similar volume and structure to Niagara contract. Consistent pricing across related markets suggests fair valuation.

Tie outcome priced at 0.75 appears inflated relative to typical hockey tie probability (~5-10%). Mid_prob likely reflects illiquidity or data error. Fair value substantially lower; adjusted down to 0.10.
Chicago Feb 14 high <46°F is rare but plausible. Mid_prob 0.015 seems slightly underpriced given positive bias (0.0472). Adjusted to 0.04. Low volume increases uncertainty.
